response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive experience in geospatial data platforms and building low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems. While his recent primary languages are TypeScript and DLang rather than the required C++ or Rust, his strong foundational knowledge in systems programming, distributed architectures, and rigorous testing practices make him a highly compelling candidate who could easily adapt to the required technology stack.
strengths: Deep expertise in geospatial data processing and building GIS platforms.
Proven experience engineering low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, rigorous QA, and test-driven development.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with C++ (last noted in 2015) and has no Rust experience.
Recent roles lean heavily towards full-stack web and agentic development rather than purely backend data pipelines.
No explicit mention of routing algorithms or navigation engine development, mostly general GIS mapping.
